headline: How The i3 Verticals (IIIV) Narrative Is Shifting After Analyst Target Cuts
summary: i3 Verticals is back in focus after analysts trimmed price targets by $6 and $2, even as the fair value estimate holds steady at 31.33. Those shifts capture a split view, with some analysts seeing the cuts as a reset that makes expectations more realistic, while others read them as a warning that earlier growth assumptions were too upbeat. As you read on, you will see how these changes shape the evolving analyst story and what to watch next in that debate. Stay updated as the Fair Value for...
